IncidentDef.label: Horny rush (female)
IncidentDef.letterText: A surge of raw, untamed energy has struck the female colonists! Their desires have peaked instantly, compelling them to look for mates...

IncidentDef.label: Horny rush (male)
IncidentDef.letterText: A surge of raw, untamed energy has struck the male colonists! Their desires have peaked instantly, compelling them to look for mates...
